name: computer-use
description: Local Windows computer-use plugin with skills and MCP tools for discovery, capture, and UI automation.

interface.shortDescription: Inspect and control Windows apps through the local computer_use project.
interface.longDescription: This plugin packages the local computer_use project as an agent plugin. It ships MCP tools for window discovery, snapshots, text input, pointer input, UIA element actions, and turn-scoped lifecycle handling, plus a skill that teaches the expected workflow for this repository's implementation.
defaultPrompt: Inspect a Windows app with the local computer_use plugin.
Capture a window snapshot and act on its controls.
Automate a Windows workflow through the plugin MCP tools.
